articles.title: Guggenheim Upgrades Fluence Energy to Neutral — Guggenheim  analyst Joseph Osha   upgrades Fluence Energy (NASDAQ:FLNC) from Sell to Neutral.
Fluence: The Data Center Opportunity Looks Promising, But Other Risks Remain — Fluence Energy has underperformed its peers in a big way since listing, although the past year has been less troubling.
